hub.title: Set up Entity Guard hub
hub.description: The hub owns the global master switch (switch.entity_guard_master_enabled). Only one hub instance is allowed.

rule.title: New rule — basics
rule.description: Name the rule, pick the target entities to enforce against, and choose the rule mode.

data_description.rule_name: Display name shown in the UI. Must be unique.
data_description.target_entities: One or more entities this rule will enforce.
data_description.mode: State mode forces a specific state. Attribute mode clamps a numeric attribute.

state.title: State mode
state.description: When the entity is in any of the trigger states, force it to the target state after the delay.

data_description.trigger_states: List of states that arm enforcement (e.g. on, open, unlocked). Type to add custom values.
data_description.target_state: State the entity will be forced to (e.g. off, closed, locked).
data_description.delay_seconds: Wait this long after a trigger before enforcing. 0 = immediate.

attribute.title: Attribute mode
attribute.description: When the attribute crosses the threshold, clamp it to the target value after the delay.

data_description.operator: Comparison operator. Equality is intentionally not supported (float precision).
data_description.threshold: Numeric value compared against the live attribute.
data_description.target_value: Value to set the attribute to when the rule fires.
data_description.delay_seconds: Wait this long after a trigger before enforcing. 0 = immediate.

flags.title: Flag conditions
flags.description: Optional gating conditions (AND'd). The rule only enforces when every flag matches. Currently {count} flag(s): {summary}. Leave both fields blank and uncheck "add another" to finish.

data.add_another: Add another flag after this one

data_description.entity: Entity whose state must match for the rule to be armed.
data_description.match_state: Exact state value the flag entity must be in (e.g. on, home, true).
data_description.add_another: Check to keep adding flags. Uncheck to continue.

advanced.title: Advanced
advanced.description: Debounce smooths flapping triggers. Rate limit auto-suppresses runaway loops.

data_description.debounce_enabled: Coalesce rapid trigger changes within the debounce window.
data_description.debounce_seconds: Window in seconds. Only used when debounce is enabled.
data_description.max_enforcements_per_minute: Exceeding this rate auto-suppresses the rule for 15 minutes and fires entity_guard_loop_detected.

safety.title: Safety acknowledgment
safety.description: This rule targets safety-sensitive entities ({entities}). You must explicitly acknowledge the risk to continue.

data.safety_acknowledged: I understand this rule will move physical hardware and accept the risk.

error.empty_target_entities: Pick at least one target entity.
error.empty_trigger_states: Provide at least one trigger state.
error.invalid_threshold: Threshold and target value must be numeric.
error.incomplete_flag: Both flag entity and required state must be set.
error.safety_not_acknowledged: You must acknowledge the safety risk to continue.

abort.single_instance_allowed: Only one Entity Guard hub can be configured.
abort.name_already_exists: A rule with this name already exists.

edit_safety.title: Safety acknowledgment
edit_safety.description: New safety-sensitive entities were added. Re-acknowledge to save.

data.safety_acknowledged: I understand this rule will move physical hardware and accept the risk.

edit_flags.title: Edit flag conditions
edit_flags.description: Current flags: {summary}. Choose 'add' to append, 'clear' to remove all, or 'save' to leave unchanged.

error.empty_target_entities: Pick at least one target entity.
error.empty_trigger_states: Provide at least one trigger state.
error.invalid_threshold: Threshold and target value must be numeric.
error.incomplete_flag: Both flag entity and required state must be set.
error.safety_not_acknowledged: You must acknowledge the safety risk to continue.

abort.name_already_exists: A rule with this name already exists.
abort.hub_no_options: The Entity Guard hub has no editable options.

suppress.name: Suppress rule
suppress.description: Temporarily suppress an Entity Guard rule. The rule auto-resumes after the duration.

rule_id.name: Rule
rule_id.description: Rule UUID or rule name (config entry title).

duration_minutes.name: Duration (minutes)
duration_minutes.description: How long to suppress the rule (1-1440 minutes).

unsuppress.name: Unsuppress rule
unsuppress.description: Resume a suppressed Entity Guard rule immediately.

rule_id.name: Rule
rule_id.description: Rule UUID or rule name (config entry title).

list_rules.name: List rules
list_rules.description: Return the configuration and current status of every Entity Guard rule.

clear_history.name: Clear rule history
clear_history.description: Clear stored enforcement history (counts, last enforced, cooldowns) for a rule.

rule_id.name: Rule
rule_id.description: Rule UUID or rule name (config entry title).

panic_stop.name: Panic stop
panic_stop.description: Emergency kill — disable every rule, clear all cooldowns, suppress for 60 minutes, and turn off the hub master switch.
